title: Vance: US 'making progress' in Iran talks — spoke with Kushner/Witkoff, 'fundamental question is President's red line'
snippet: VP JD Vance on May 13 said 'I think that we are making progress. The fundamental question is do we make enough progress that we satisfy the President's red line' — ensuring Iran never has nuclear weapons. Vance said he spoke with Kushner and Witkoff that morning and contacts in Arab world.
tag_reason: New statement by Vance on 5/13, not previously reported
